chapter_title.en: Chapter 37 – Abhorrence of the guest serving

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/93)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/93)

parts.text: عُبَيْدِ بْنِ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الْبَغْدَادِيِّ

text: نَزَلَ بِأَبِي الْحَسَنِ الرِّضَا ( عليه السلام ) ضَيْفٌ وَ كَانَ جَالِساً عِنْدَهُ يُحَدِّثُهُ فِي بَعْضِ اللَّيْلِ فَتَغَيَّرَ السِّرَاجُ فَمَدَّ الرَّجُلُ يَدَهُ لِيُصْلِحَهُ فَزَبَرَهُ أَبُو الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) ثُمَّ بَادَرَهُ بِنَفْسِهِ فَأَصْلَحَهُ ثُمَّ قَالَ لَهُ إِنَّا قَوْمٌ لَا نَسْتَخْدِمُ أَضْيَافَنَا .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Al Sayyari, from Ubeyd Bin Abu Abdullah Al Baghdady, from the one who informed him, said,

‘A guest had lodge with Abu Al-Hassan Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup>, and was seated in his<sup>asws</sup> presence discussing with him<sup>asws</sup> in one of the nights. So the lantern dimmed, and the man extended his hand to correct it. So Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> stopped him, then attended to it himself<sup>asws</sup>, so he<sup>asws</sup> corrected it. Then he<sup>asws</sup> said to him: ‘We<sup>asws</sup> are a people who do not make our<sup>asws</sup> gests to serve’.
en.sarwar: 2. Al-Husayn from Muhammad has narrated from al-Sayyariy from ‘Ubayd ibn abu ‘Abd Allah al-Baghdadiy from those who narrated to him who has said the following: “Once abu al-Hassan, al-Rida’ ‘Alayhi al-Salam, had a guest who was sitting with him (the Imam) and speaking during the night. The lamp began to become dim and the man stretched his hand to repair it. Abu al-Hassan, stopped him seriously and he (the Imam) himself repaired the lamp saying, ‘We are a people who do not make the guests work.’”
